name: git-vscode
description: VsGit-style Git client for VS Code: Repositories, Staging, History, Graph, Compare, Worktrees, LFS, Gerrit, and more.

viewsWelcome.contents:
No Git repositories found in the open workspace.
[Clone Repository](command:vsgit.clone)
[Initialize Repository](command:vsgit.init)
[Refresh](command:vsgit.repositories.refresh)

No Git repositories found in the open workspace.
[Clone Repository](command:vsgit.clone)
[Initialize Repository](command:vsgit.init)
[Refresh](command:vsgit.repositories.refresh)

vsgit.commit.gpgSign.description: Sign commits with GPG by default (-S).

vsgit.commit.signOff.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer to commits by default (DCO).

vsgit.fetch.pruneOnFetch.description: Prune deleted remote-tracking branches when fetching.

vsgit.history.maxCommits.description: Maximum number of commits to load in the History view.

vsgit.blame.enabledByDefault.description: Show inline blame annotations when opening files.

vsgit.git.path.description: Custom path to the git executable. Leave empty to use the system default.

vsgit.autoRefresh.description: Automatically refresh views when repository state changes.

vsgit.autoFetch.enabled.description: Automatically fetch from all remotes at a regular interval.

vsgit.graph.pageSize.description: Number of commits to load per page in the History view.

vsgit.graph.sortOrder.description: Commit sort order for the History view.

vsgit.confirmDestructiveActions.description: Show a confirmation dialog before destructive actions (hard reset, clean, force-push, etc.).

vsgit.showCommandPreview.description: Show the exact git command in a preview before executing it.

vsgit.graph.showStatusBarItem.description: Show a 'Git Graph' button in the status bar (footer).

vsgit.graph.style.description: Branch line style in the Git Graph: smooth curves (rounded) or sharp elbows (angular).

vsgit.graph.colours.description: Branch line colours (HEX or rgb) cycled through in the Git Graph.

vsgit.graph.maxCommits.description: Maximum number of commits to load in the Git Graph.

vsgit.graph.showRemoteBranches.description: Show remote branches in the Git Graph by default.

vsgit.graph.showIdColumn.description: Show the Id (commit hash) column in the Git Graph.

vsgit.graph.showAuthorColumn.description: Show the Author column in the Git Graph.

vsgit.graph.showCommittedDateColumn.description: Show the Date column in the Git Graph.

vsgit.graph.dateFormat.description: Date format used in the Git Graph (standard shows an absolute date/time, relative shows e.g. '5d ago').

vsgit.graph.showSidebar.description: Show the left sidebar tree (Branches, Tags, Remotes, Stashes, Submodules) in the Git Graph.

enumDescriptions: Open changed files in the native VS Code diff editor.
Render a unified diff inline within the Git Graph panel.
vsgit.graph.bottomPanelMode.description: How the Git Graph bottom panel shows a changed file's diff.
